title: Italian Fruity Dutch Currant Soup
description: A hearty and comforting Italian-inspired soup featuring fruity and currant flavors, served with a hint of Dutch spices.
instructions: Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Pour in fruity broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and add Dutch spices, currants, and simmer for 10 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with additional currants if desired.
